name: HDFC Bank PIXEL Play Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Selected 5% merchant packs (Dining & Entertainment, Travel, Grocery, Electronics, Fashion)
Selected 3% e-commerce platform (Amazon, Flipkart, or PayZapp)

exclusions: Payment of card fees, interest, and charges

specialSpendRules.notes: Insurance spends capped at 2,000 CashPoints per calendar month.

milestoneBenefits: Joining fee waiver on spending Rs 20,000 within 90 days of issuance
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 1 lakh or more in the preceding 12 months
additionalBenefits: Choose any two 5% cashback packs: Dining & Entertainment, Travel, Grocery, Electronics, or Fashion
Choose one 3% cashback ecommerce platform: Amazon, Flipkart, or PayZapp
1% cashback on UPI spends for PIXEL RuPay Credit Card holders
Manage card, rewards, EMI, statements, repayments, disputes, and controls through PayZapp
Choose billing date, merchant partners, and card colour
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Audited against official HDFC Bank PIXEL Play product page and terms on 2026-06-07.
CashPoints redemption is through the PayZapp app, with 1 CashPoint = Rs 1, minimum redemption 1,000 points.
1.75% DCC markup fee applies on transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
Classified as cashback and PIXEL CashPoints (1:1 statement balance value) on 2026-06-25.
